Help Center

Everything you need to know about sharing files with QuickTransfer.

Secure Transfers

End-to-end encryption for all your shared data.

Instant Sharing

No waiting. Codes are generated in milliseconds.

Mobile Ready

Works perfectly on smartphones and tablets.

Frequently Asked Questions

1

How do I send a file?

Simply drag and drop your file into the 'Send' card on the homepage. Once uploaded, a 6-digit code will appear. share this code with anyone you want to receive the file.

2

How do I receive a file?

Enter the 6-digit code provided by the sender into the 'Receive' card on the homepage. Click 'Receive' and the file will download instantly.

3

Is there a file size limit?

Yes, currently we support files up to 100MB for free transfers. For larger files, consider using our desktop application.

4

How long is my file available?

Files are temporary. You can select an expiration time (e.g., 5 mins, 20 mins, 1 hour). Once the timer runs out, the file is automatically deleted.

5

Is QuickTransfer secure?

Absolutely. All transfers use standard encryption. We do not store your files permanently and they are inaccessible without the unique 6-digit code.
